theorem: or_symm (P Q : Prop) (h : P ∨ Q) : Q ∨ P

gentzen_tree.explanation: 'rcases h with hp | hq' is ∨-Elimination: case split on P ∨ Q. In case 1 (P), use ∨-Intro₂. In case 2 (Q), use ∨-Intro₁.

steps.label: Case split on the disjunction
steps.explanation: h : P ∨ Q tells us one of P or Q is true. We split into two cases: one where P holds, one where Q holds. The proof must handle both.

strategy.rule: To use P ∨ Q, consider both cases separately

steps.label: Case 1: P is true, inject into the right
steps.explanation: We have hp : P and need Q ∨ P. Since P is the right side, we use Or.inr to inject hp into the right branch of the disjunction.

steps.label: Case 2: Q is true, inject into the left
steps.explanation: Now in the second case, we have hq : Q. To prove Q ∨ P, we use Or.inl to inject into the left. Both cases handled!
